feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Pay recurring import
entry.content:
Good Day,

In 2023 release there was an enhancement for importing pay recurring components that there is no need for 2 imports and compensation new record is created automatically.


My question is with this change the compensation change event/ reason should be now included in pay recc import template or there should be business rules that will create that based on the configuration.

Thank you

katarzyna

entry.title: Problems in the onboarding process. Is there any solution how to move the onboardee to Manage Pendin
entry.content:
Hello community,

@Gopinath @smitajalit @piyushkumarag 

Issue
We are experiencing problems at various points in our onboarding process and are unable to move the process forward. We cannot complete tasks for the onboardee, even though we have the permissions. Restart does not work either. hese are just a few of the problems. We have not made any changes to the process.

Failed solutions:

A process update was unsuccessful.

The data mapping does not show any errors as well.

We have set the status for data collection under Manage Data to completed in the hope that the system will move the onboardee to Manage Pending hire, but again the process does not react.

The BPE user does not receive any error messages either.

We have already submitted an SAP ticket with high priority.  

QUESTIONS:
Can we manually move/load the onboardees to Manage Pending hires in any way so that we transfer them to Employee Central before their start date. We would fill in the data here.

Have there been any updates/work in the background at SAP?

I appreciate any advice or possible solutions 

Best regards, Ali

entry.title: Manage Pending hire Report
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

How do we get report on manage pending hire if not how do we make manage pending hire employee list to 500 instead of 20 because we need to keep loading it

Any other suggestions are welocme.

Regards,
Vinod

entry.title: SSFF - New Hire Email Notifications not working or inconsistent
entry.content:
Hello.

We have a configuration for new hire email notifications that was working fine until Thursday February 1st. The last email that was correctly sent and received was at 8:58 am (GMT-6). The emails were not being received by everyone on the CC roles within the workflow. Only some people were getting some notifications, and even some people were not getting any. Checked roles, workflows, and centralized settings, and everything was normal, and had not been changed in a while. Also checked firewall with IT department and spam folders, but there is no issue with those. Is anyone else having this problem? Is there a way to fix it or a workaround for this issue? This is really impacting our daily operations.

Thanks in advance.

Regards.

entry.title: Purge: Would system warns me in case the inactive employee has a future rehire event?
entry.content:
Hi team, 

 

I want to purge several employees. 

Does SF EC warns me when I'm trying to purge (current) inactive employees which have a future event (such as re-hire). Any idea how to report this population? 

Thanks in advance!

Kind regards

Oli

entry.title: Orphan Person ID in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello All

There is a check called "There are no Orphan Person IDs" which returned few orphan IDs with the last modified date and last modified by. Is there any possible way to find out what modifications are done on those orphan IDs? Can we retrieve the original IDs of the orphan person IDs using ad-hoc/canvas reports?

Thanks,

Tejasri N

entry.title: How to change the originator on a live performance form
entry.content:
Hi All,

I like to know how to change the originator on a live performance form. I launched some performance forms for our company as myself and and I am showing as the originator, but I would like to change the originator to an admin. 

Can someone please tell if this is possible and how I go about doing it.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Asset Management in Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I would like to know how to set up assest management against an employee profile. For instance, someone who is having company car and would like to enter the details of the car against the employee similar for having IT assets like laptop etc.

We do not want to use the benefit module for the company car as the requirement has nothing to do with payroll. Just want to store details of the asset against the employee. Anyone has any insight on this topic?

entry.title: Time account with 3 yearly frequency and account validity
entry.content:
My client want to setup a leave type for 3 years which means time accounts are valid for 3 year and accrual frequency is also 3 yearly. For ex, A/c 

Account Valid From 01/01/2024  Account Valid Until  31/12/2026.

Booking Possible From 01/01/2024  Booking Possible Until  31/12/2026

Accrual Frequency 3 yearly and accrual say 30 days.

Next time if employee completes 3 or more years with Org his accounts should be created as follows,

Account Valid From 01/01/2027  Account Valid Until  31/12/2029

Booking Possible From 01/01/2027  Booking Possible Until  31/12/2029.

Booking period can be adjusted by "Account booking offset" or "Time Account Configuration Rule" but is there any provision to change accrual frequency to 3 yearly and time account validity?

Your input is highly appreciated.

Thanks,

Abhi

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core

entry.title: After the activation of the Termination end handling process, Time accounts are not all closed
entry.content:
After the activation of the Termination end handling process, we have notice that sometimes the job does not close all Time accounts in Time Off Employee’s profile.

Moreover whe have checked in Admin Alert and Employees does not reflect in the logs.

It would be great to review that behavior please.

Thanks by advance.

entry.title: Canvas / Advance reports- Cannot select few fields- Grayed out
entry.content:
Hello All,
I noticed that I am not able to select a few fields in the Canvas reporting tool.

The fields are grayed out. Such as "Factor" field in Compensation.

I already checked if the default label for the field is enabled in the succession data model and it is available.

What are the other possible reasons for it?

Kindly advice.

SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core SAP SuccessFactors Workforce Analytics

entry.title: deducting balance if leave is not utilized in 90 days time off successfactors
entry.content:
We have a validity of 90 days from the date of adding a comp off.
Can we have business rule to make sure the Comp off balance is deducted at the back end, if it not been used.

entry.title: time profile inserted in 2023, time account is being created in 2024
entry.content:
Hello peers.

Much as i try, i am inserting a time profile in a job info register of 2023 but it is creating a time account of 2024,

I check the rule log and it automatically assumes that must trigger a rule with the 2024 accrual start and end dates.

In view of this i would like to know if that is the default behaviour of the system, and it is detecting that we are currently in 2024 or somewhat.

Is that the reason?

 

Regards

entry.title: I would like the system to autmatically send a mail with an attachment created in SAP SF EC
entry.content: I would like the system to autmatically send a mail with an attachment created in SAP SF EC when a workflow is finally approved. Is that possible?

entry.title: Future Hire Notification to Manager in EC
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Requirement is to trigger notification/Alert to Manager when employee is A Future hire. Please help me to understand if this is possible.

If any one of you have implemented this scenario please let me know

entry.title: Termination rule is not triggering if the termination date is the end date of the month.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a leave type called Vacation Days for our USA employees. We are posting balances for this leave type based on the monthly frequency, but it’s not a straight forward monthly posting. We are posting the balances of previous month to the current month.

Ex: - On Jan 1st system will not post any accruals to employees. The Jan month accruals will be posted on 1st Feb, the Feb month accruals will be posted in 1st Mar, this will repeat every month.

We are facing the issue with termination scenario.

As we are posting the previous month balances on 1st of the current month, and if we initiate the termination action for any employee in the current month then system need to add the current month balances to the accrual.

Ex: - As per our policy, employees are eligible to get 0.44 hours per day. The Jan month accruals (31 days X 0.44 hours = 13.64 hours) we are posting on 1st Feb. Now if we initiate the termination by selecting the termination date as 20th Feb then system need to update the balances as below.

Jan month calculation (31 days X 0.44 hours = 13.64 hours) + No of days in Feb till 20th Feb (20 days X 0.44 = 8.8 hours) = Total 22.44 hours.

We have this logic on termination rule to post the balances on termination date as per the above calculation. This calculation is working fine if we select any date except 29th Feb. If we select the termination date as 29th Feb then system is not triggering the termination rule.

We observed this behavior if we select the termination date as the end date of the month (Ex: - 31st Jan, 29th Feb, 31st Mar, 30th Apr and so on).

Please let me know how to resolve the issue.

Regards,

Hafeez

entry.title: Unable to set a header or property in query options for SuccessFactors ODATA V2 Adapter
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am querying a SuccessFactors entity (WfRequest) using the ODATA V2 adapter with the following query options

$select=wfRequestId,createdBy,createdDateTime,lastModifiedBy,lastModifiedDateTime,status,url&$filter=status eq 'PENDING' and lastModifiedDateTime gt datetimeoffset'2024-01-01T00:00:00.000'&$orderby=lastModifiedDateTime desc

I wish to set this datetime in bold as a header (or property) like this
$select=wfRequestId,createdBy,createdDateTime,lastModifiedBy,lastModifiedDateTime,status,url&$filter=status eq 'PENDING' and lastModifiedDateTime gt datetimeoffset'${header.lastrundatetime}'&$orderby=lastModifiedDateTime desc

I have set this header in a content modifier and was hoping that the header expression would be replaced. But I am getting an error
com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Header/Property value not found for the parameter ${header.lastrundatetime}
I have verified that there is no typo in the header name. Anything else I am missing out?

entry.title: Show Last year vacation days
entry.content:
Hello,

On the time off request I would like to have a field that shows the time off vacation days pertaining to the last year (2023) and not only 2024 vacation balance to be shown.

How can I obtain this?

 

Thank You,

 

Marko

entry.title: Extend the event reason description length limit
entry.content:
Hello, 

My client asks us to exend the maximum length of characters for the event reason description. 

I've exported the Corporate Data Model, updated the max-length for the event-reason description from 128 to 256 and re-imported the Corporate data model. 

 

Then checking in the instance, I still get an error message when trying to update the event reason description, saying that the character limit is 128

 

Do you know if I miss a configuration step or if the default limit of 128 characters cannot be changed? 

Thank you, 

Marion

entry.title: Unfortunately, our vacation business rule does not round to 0.5 days
entry.content:
Here’s an overview regarding our accrual rule dilemma. My challenges are highlighted in red.

 

Our Requirements for the accrual in the UK:

  • All full-time employees have 25 vacation days per year
    • The 25 days are pro-rated based on the job information: Working days per week
      • E.g. 3 Working days per week  25/3*5=15
  • In the UK legislatively the calculation for an employee’s first year of employment, is one twelfth of the company entitlement on the first day of each month and we would always round up to the nearest half day or full day. Examples:
    • Hire date on 4th March: 25/12 months x 10 remaining months left in the year = 20.8 , rounded up to 21 days leave
    • Termination date on 31st March: 25/12 months x 3 months worked = 6,25, rounded up to 6.5 days leave
  • Periods with parental leave are not regarded for the calculation (optional requirements, we could take this out if it makes it easier)

 

We currently have the following rule in the system:

Results are:

  • Correct: Employees get 25 days per year
  • Correct: When entiring an event (e.g. Termination), the balance shows 1 decimal, e.g. 6.3
  • Incorrect: For a termination on e.g. 31st March, the rounding is going from 6.25 to the next higher decimal, 6.3 instead of 6.5  it should always move to the next “half-day”, 6  6.5  7 …
  • Incorrect: We can’t find the solution that it always rounds up. Any option we tried, was rounding down if it was <.5 (e.g. 6.01  6.00 instead of 6.5)

You shared the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2321693/e --> I tried it, but as also stated in their description it also rounds down and not always up (e.g. 6.2  6.00 instead of 6.5)

 

You also shared the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2337100/e  I tried the exact rule, however I don’t get any accrual balance at all. Maybe I need to add something in addition. Also from reading the rule, I can’t find the logic, where it would define, that it’s always rounded up to the next half day. (meaning 6.2  6.5 instead of 6.3).

 

For the note, SAP (ticket is in the 5th cycle now) shared this documentation with me:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_TIME_TRACKING/6619e553226244d89872529ae3f8df34/5fb83abb25b6421d9aadaa55cbe512c0.html?q=Round%20Function&version=2211

 

This seems to be the correct rule, according to the text specification. However I was unable to build this since the marked information is not available in my dropdowns:
